question_text: Unresponsive or no pulse?
Severe trouble breathing or turning blue?
Severe chest pain or pressure?
Severe bleeding that won't stop with pressure?
Seizure now or repeated seizures?
New weakness/numbness or trouble speaking (stroke concern)?
Severe allergic reaction (throat swelling/wheeze/fainting)?
Severe confusion or not acting normal?
Severe headache (worst) with neuro symptoms?
Severe abdominal pain with fainting or black/bloody stool?
Major trauma (high-speed crash, fall from height, penetrating injury)?
On blood thinners (anticoagulants)?
Pregnant or postpartum (within 6 weeks)?
Age under 6 or over 65?
Fever with stiff neck or purple rash?
Severe dehydration (cannot keep fluids, fainting)?
Severe pain out of proportion (compartment/ischemia concern)?
No safe way to get emergency help now?
Symptoms worsening rapidly right now?
High-speed motor vehicle crash (MVA)?
Rollover, ejection, death in same vehicle, or prolonged extrication?
Fall from height (adult >10 ft / child >5 ft)?
Penetrating injury (stab/gunshot) or major blunt force?
Loss of consciousness or amnesia?
Vomiting or worsening headache after injury?
On blood thinners (anticoagulants)?
Neck pain or midline spine tenderness?
New weakness/numbness or trouble speaking/walking?
Chest pain or trouble breathing?
Abdominal pain, distention, or seatbelt sign?
Pelvic pain or instability, or blood in urine?
Severe bleeding or large wounds?
Severe pain out of proportion or tense swollen limb?
Pregnant or could be pregnant?
Age 65+ or child under 6?
Severe weakness, confusion, or looks very ill (shock concern)?
Unable to bear weight or use limb normally?
Symptoms worsening rapidly?
